recommendations.title: The Swimmer
recommendations.overview: A man spends a summer day swimming home via all the pools in his quiet suburban neighborhood.

recommendations.title: Big Hero 6
recommendations.overview: A special bond develops between plus-sized inflatable robot Baymax, and prodigy Hiro Hamada, who team up with a group of friends to form a band of high-tech heroes.

recommendations.title: The Sea Beast
recommendations.overview: When a young girl stows away on the ship of a legendary sea monster hunter, they launch an epic journey into uncharted waters — and make history to boot.

recommendations.title: Bolt
recommendations.overview: Bolt is the star of the biggest show in Hollywood. The only problem is, he thinks it's real. After he's accidentally shipped to New York City and separated from Penny, his beloved co-star and owner, Bolt must harness all his "super powers" to find a

recommendations.title: Within
recommendations.overview: A widower, his daughter, and his new wife move into a peaceful neighborhood. At first it appears to be a perfect neighborhood but the family quickly realize that something is not right about their new home.

recommendations.title: Once Upon a Snowman
recommendations.overview: The previously untold origins of Olaf, the innocent and insightful, summer-loving snowman are revealed as we follow Olaf’s first steps as he comes to life and searches for his identity in the snowy mountains outside Arendelle.

recommendations.title: Level 16
recommendations.overview: The teenage girls of Vestalis Academy are meticulously trained in the art of being “clean girls,” practicing the virtues of perfect femininity. But what exactly are they being trained for? Vivien intends to find out.

recommendations.title: Poison Ivy: The New Seduction
recommendations.overview: A sinister seductress vows to destroy a suburban family.

recommendations.title: The Balconettes
recommendations.overview: As a heat wave brings a Marseille neighborhood to a boil, three roommates gleefully meddle in the lives of their neighbors from their balcony. Until a late night drink turns into a bloody affair.

recommendations.title: Save the Date
recommendations.overview: After breaking up with her boyfriend, a bookstore manager resists a seemingly perfect guy's attempts to woo her.
